candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches top-line revenues and equals Total Revenue figures.
Subtotal/total line duplicating Revenues; kept as backup in case of label change over time.
Depreciation component of COGS, not revenue; excluded from final choice.
Represents cost of sales, not revenue; excluded from final choice.
Financial income, not operating revenue; excluded from final choice.
Interest income, not core operating revenue; excluded from final choice.
Income tax line, not revenue; excluded from final choice.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue; excluded from final choice.
Liability for unearned revenue on balance sheet; not the revenue flow; excluded from final choice.

variables.notes: Both 'Revenues' and 'Total Revenue' represent the same top-line sales; 'Revenues' is treated as the primary label with 'Total Revenue' as a fallback for years where only the total might be populated.

candidates.why: Primary cost of goods sold line; matches typical COGS concept and figures align with Cost of revenues/COGS.
Component of COGS (transport/tariff), but we prefer the aggregate COGS line rather than individual components.
Minor adjustment component within COGS; not the main COGS aggregate.
Alternate label for total COGS with identical values to 'Cost of goods sold'; used as backup in case of label changes.
Net operating income/expense, not direct production cost; excluded.
SG&A overhead, not direct cost of sales; excluded from COGS.
Other operating overhead, not direct cost of sales; excluded from COGS.
Likely part of SG&A/overhead, not clearly restricted to direct production costs; excluded for COGS aggregate.

candidates.row_label: Salaries and Social Expenses - the rest
candidates.why: Additional salaries overhead; not the main COGS aggregate.
SG&A component; excluded from COGS.
Exploration charges in oil & gas; not standard COGS definition for PROF; excluded.
Net operating result, not COGS; excluded.
Financing costs, not COGS; excluded.
Financing costs, not COGS; excluded.
Net financing line, not COGS; excluded.
Non-operating result, not COGS; excluded.
Rental, an overhead component, not direct cost of goods sold aggregate; excluded.

candidates.row_label: Drilling equipment, spare parts and consumables
candidates.why: Balance sheet inventory item, not period COGS expense; excluded.
Balance sheet asset, not expense; excluded.
Current liability, not cost of goods sold; excluded.

variables.notes: COGS is best represented by the aggregate 'Cost of goods sold' line, with 'Cost of revenues/COGS' included as an alternate label showing identical values over the preview period.

candidates.why: Net other operating income/expenses; part of operating overhead and suitable as an SG&A component bucket.
Classic SG&A overhead category; should be included as a core SG&A component.
Additional operating overhead, appropriate as SG&A component.
Further breakdown of admin expenses; clearly SG&A-related and should be included.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total exists, so multiple overhead components are selected: admin-related lines plus other operating expenses and the net other operating income/expenses bucket, all excluding totals or balancing items.

candidates.why: Represents capitalized development assets (likely oil & gas), not a recurring R&D expense line; not appropriate as XRD.

variables.notes: There is no explicit research & development expense line in the income statement. 'Development Property, Net' is a balance sheet asset and not an R&D expense. XRD is therefore treated as missing (0) for PROF purposes.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; although preview values are nan, its presence indicates reported interest expense in at least one year.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Main detailed interest expense measure (net of capitalized interest) with populated values; best primary line for XINT.
Capitalized interest, not interest expense; excluded from XINT selection.
Income/expense from associates, not interest expense; excluded.
Income attributable to minorities, not interest expense; excluded.
Balance sheet liability, not P&L interest expense; excluded.
Balance sheet accrual of interest, not the period expense line itself; excluded.
Balance sheet liability, not P&L interest expense; excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Interest expense is best captured by the detailed line 'Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest', with the more generic 'Interest Expense' kept as a secondary fallback label for years where only that line may be populated.

candidates.why: Represents equity attributable to shareholders; excludes any separate minority interest line and is ideal for BE.
Component within equity, not total equity; excluded.
Total equity including any minorities; less precise for BE given we have a specific shareholders equity line.
Total equity including minority interests; would cause double counting if used together with a separate MIB term.
Technical balancing adjustment, not equity; excluded.

variables.notes: 'Shareholders equity' is used as book equity (BE) because it represents equity attributable to owners, avoiding inclusion of any minority interests that may be embedded in broader total equity figures.

candidates.why: Income from associates, not a balance sheet minority interest; excluded.
Income statement allocation to minorities, not the balance sheet minority equity; not suitable for MIB stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not a minority interest balance; excluded.
Total equity including minorities but not isolating the minority portion; using it would double count with BE. Not appropriate for a pure MIB line.

variables.notes: The balance sheet does not present a separate 'Non-controlling interests' or similar minority equity line. Since BE is mapped to 'Shareholders equity' (which is owner equity), there is no distinct MIB balance to add; MIB is therefore set to [].
